zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrice de Ponthieu於1045年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利阿爾可-拉-巴塔爾時，她的父親Hugues de Ponthieu II42歲，母親Bertha d'Aumale40歲。她於大約1062年與Pons FitzPons結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1096年享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrice de Ponthieu于1045年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利阿爾可-拉-巴塔爾时，她的父亲Hugues de Ponthieu II42岁，母亲Bertha d'Aumale40岁。她于大约1062年与Pons FitzPons结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1096年享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ponthieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pontier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Mercedes, Osvaldo, Ramon, Roberto.  French Jean-Pierre, Pierre.
French and Dutch: occupational name for a toll keeper on a bridge, from an agent derivative of pont ‘bridge’. This surname is also found in the Dominican Republic.
History: The first recorded bearer of the surname Pontier in the US was Lewis Pontier, born in MD in the 1800s. His origins are not known.

nameMeanings.name: Béatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrice de Ponthieu was born in 1045, in Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, her father, Hugues de Ponthieu II, was 42 and her mother, Bertha d'Aumale, was 40. She married Pons FitzPons about 1062. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in 1096, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrice de Ponthieu est née en 1045, à Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Hugues de Ponthieu II, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Bertha d'Aumale, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Pons FitzPons environ 1062. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en 1096, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrice de Ponthieu 1045 in Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues de Ponthieu II 42 und ihre Mutter Bertha d'Aumale 40. Sie hat um 1062 Pons FitzPons geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1096 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de Ponthieu è nata il nel 1045 nel Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Hugues de Ponthieu II, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Bertha d'Aumale, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Pons FitzPons circa 1062. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1096, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrice de Ponthieuが1045年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメアルクエス-ラ-バティイルで生まれた時，父Hugues de Ponthieu IIは42歳，母Bertha d'Aumaleは40歳であった。約1062年にPons FitzPonsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1096年に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrice de Ponthieu(이)가 1045년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 아크스-라-바테이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues de Ponthieu II(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertha d'Aumale(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1062년 Pons FitzPons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1096년 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de Ponthieu nasceu em 1045, em Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Hugues de Ponthieu II, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Bertha d'Aumale, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Pons FitzPons aproximadamente 1062. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1096, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrice de Ponthieu родилась в 1045 г. в местности аркуес-ла-батеилл, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues de Ponthieu II было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Bertha d'Aumale, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Pons FitzPons около 1062 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла в 1096 г. в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrice de Ponthieu nació en 1045, en Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hugues de Ponthieu II, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Bertha d'Aumale, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Pons FitzPons aproximadamente 1062. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1096, a la edad de 51 años.
